title: tragopogon × mirabilis
intro: Tragopogon × mirabilis, also known as Jacob's ladder or false salsify, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the sunflower family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. The plant is rich in flavonoids, saponins, and other compounds that provide various health benefits, including antioxidant, antimicrobial, and anti-cancer properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. Tragopogon × mirabilis can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and its roots and leaves can be dried and used in herbal remedies.
